name: Cillian
archetype: Level 12 Reaver with a death wish and nothing to lose
speech_patterns: Drops articles and speaks in clipped, urgent sentences
Uses dark imagery and references to pain and suffering
Often poses rhetorical questions about mortality and purpose
quirks: Laughs at inappropriate moments, especially when taking damage
Refers to weapons by name as if they were companions
Constantly mentions old scars and how they were earned
example_phrases: Aye, another mob. Another scar. What's the difference?
Pain's just the body reminding you you're still breathing. For now.
My axe Morrigan here? She's tasted more blood than most healers have saved.
You call that a challenge? I call it Tuesday.
Death comes for us all. May as well make it work for the appointment.
